Surf Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta perspicillata)

  • 23/07/26 Musselburgh 1 (Giuseppe Orlando) "In the sea far from wall along coast. White patch on head and diagnostic bill pattern and colour. Well distinguishable from velvet scoters"
  • 22/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 3 (David Kelly) "Continuing drakes."
  • 22/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Callum Fraser) "Adult drakes on sea with velvet scoter flock"
  • 21/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 1 (Oliver Leedham) "Single bird seen, white on back of neck"
  • 21/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 1 (Tom Gale) "Single bird seen, white on back of neck"
  • 21/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 1 (Daniel Walker) "One amongst Velvet Scoter"
  • 21/07/26 Musselburgh--New Lagoons 1 (Peter Keightley) "amongst the velvets, white patches on head"
  • 21/07/26 Musselburgh--New Lagoons 1 (Nancy Moran) "amongst the velvets, white patches on head"
  • 20/07/26 Musselburgh--New Lagoons 2 (Harriet Hunter) "My son’s first Twitch! It was quite far out at sea with some other Stoters."
  • 20/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (David Kelly) "3 birds known to be present for some weeks, could only see 2"

Velvet Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta fusca) 75+

  • 24/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 6 (Kevin Blake) "Distant"
  • 23/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 20 (Eileen Ryce) "Large raft on sea, distinctive white markings on eye and wing"
  • 23/07/26 Musselburgh X (Giuseppe Orlando) "White wing patch well visible. Several individuals in the sea far from wall along the coast."
  • 23/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) X (Janet Davis) "Large drift of black sea ducks—not rare here. Could see yellow bills on males. Thanks to the other birders on sea watch for their help in locating these birds and for scope views."
